claims.summary: A flat viscosity vector risks metric dilution; the system needs a weighted readout that names which dimension currently matters most.
When pressure risk rises above the review threshold, structural strain should become more salient without directly changing control.
Restless-but-stable shadow volatility should remain visible as valid carried texture, not collapse into stuckness.
Using viscosity importance weights to drive regulator decisions would alter live pressure/fill/PI/controller authority.
